CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
SELECT id, (SELECT data FROM test_table2 WHERE id = test_table.id) AS related_data FROM test_table;
SELECT a.id, b.data FROM test_table a JOIN test_table2 b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT a.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table2) AS count_data FROM test_table a;
SELECT optimizer FROM sys.environment WHERE name = 'sql_optimizer';
SELECT a.id, b.data FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE 'test%') a JOIN (SELECT id, data FROM test_table2 WHERE data IS NOT NULL) b ON a.id = b.id;
